name: code_sandbox_light_0b5a98fd_1774960156
description: A full-featured, mobile-first Progressive Web App (PWA) that: - Converts invoice PDFs → Excel (`.xlsx`) using pdf.js + SheetJS - Creates professional GST invoices (3-step generator, 7 templates) - Authenticates users via **real Google OAuth** (Supabase) or email/password - Persists invoices & drafts to **Supabase Postgres** (with localStorage fallback) - Works fully offline via Service Worker caching
